libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: For native-image run coverage on JDK 25, ensure the generated test build passes runtime system properties to the native test executable: -Dsun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow and -Dio.netty.tryReflectionSetAccessible=true. Do not keep the current condition limited to libraryVersion == '5.0.0'; apply it for 5.0.1 as well, or more generally for Vert.x 5 / Netty 4.2.x. Core WebClient tests should use an embedded Vert.x HttpServer on localhost rather than external network services.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7998 [Automation] native-image run fails for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: vertx-web-client declares io.vertx:vertx-auth-oauth2 as optional; avoid OAuth2WebClient-specific tests unless that optional dependency is deliberately added.
The system-property workaround is native/JDK-version sensitive; local Gradle and Native Image verification remain authoritative.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1 still resolves Vert.x 5 with Netty 4.2.x, and the existing 5.0.0 test already documents that Java 25 native runs need explicit Netty/Unsafe system properties; no extra Maven dependency or Docker service is needed for meaningful WebClient coverage because normal usage can exercise a local Vert.x HTTP server.
